pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing export_result.sh, which extracts candidate coordinates from this exact file path.

Task instructions ask for 3 candidates. Analysis of the Vcomb.fits and Bcomb.fits datasets using the task's validity criteria confirms there are 23 extreme color stars in the images, making the requirement of 3 perfectly feasible.
Verified via install_astroimagej.sh, which downloads real observational data (Vcomb.zip and Bcomb.zip) from esahubble.org's m12 dataset.

privileged_info_summary: The agent must identify at least 3 extremely red stars by comparing V-band and B-band images. The task uses real observational FITS data of the Messier 12 globular cluster from the VLT, downloaded via ESA Hubble datasets. Independent execution of the scoring logic on the actual data confirmed that there are 23 valid stars meeting the mathematical 'extremely red' criteria (>2.5x field median color ratio), meaning the goal of finding 3 candidates is achievable. Results are evaluated based on coordinate entries in /home/ga/AstroImages/color_search/red_candidates.txt.
